policy-search
POST
/api/v1/{tenant_id}/policies/search

Search policies with visibility-aware filtering. Policies are visible if the user has access to the client organisation via ABAC rules, or if the user is directly related to the policy via policy_agent_relationships.

Request
Path Parameters
tenant_id
string
required

The tenant ID

Examples:
t_123
Body
application/json
application/json
agent_id
string

Filter by agent ID in policy relationships (exact match)

Example:
agent_123
agent_organisation_external_id
string

Filter by policy agency external ID (exact match)

Example:
ORG001
agent_organisation_id
string

Filter by policy agency ID (exact match)

Example:
ao_123
agent_organisation_name
string

Filter by policy agency name (partial match, case insensitive)

Example:
Guardian Agency
carrier
string

Filter by carrier (partial match, case insensitive)

Example:
State
client_organisation_id
string

Filter by client organisation ID (exact match)

Example:
co_123
line_of_business
string

Filter by line of business (exact match)

Example:
Life

cast_type
string

Optional PostgreSQL type to cast the sort column to before sorting. This is essential for correct sorting of JSONB fields (like Salesforce custom fields in extra_properties) that store numeric or date values as strings. Without casting, PostgreSQL sorts as text where '10' < '2' (lexicographic). With casting, values sort correctly: 2 < 10 (numeric). Supported types: 'numeric' (for decimals, currency, percentages - e.g., 123.45), 'integer' (for whole numbers, counts - e.g., 42), 'text' (explicit string sort, rarely needed), 'timestamp' (for date-time values - e.g., '2025-01-15 14:30:00'), 'date' (for date-only values - e.g., '2025-01-15'). Example: To sort by Salesforce custom field 'Total_Targeted_Amount_Growth__c' numerically, use sort_column='client_organisation_extra_properties.Total_Targeted_Amount_Growth__c' with cast_type='numeric'.

Allowed values:
numeric
integer
text
timestamp
date
Example:
numeric
collation
string

salesforce
Default:

string
required

OK

application/json
responses
/

string<uri>

rmds
array[object] or null
required

string

Given name of the AssignedTo user

string

string

string

string

Primary Contact / relationship owner for client-facing communications

client_last_name
string

Client contact surname

client_organisation_name
string

Household/entity display name

client_organisation_status
string

Active, Prospective, Closed

client_organisation_type
string

e.g., Individual, Trust, LLC

client_organization_id
string

Household / legal entity that owns the account (nullable if you key off Contact only)

created_at
string<date-time>
required

Timestamp the record was first created in this system (UTC)

details
string

Free-text notes, special handling instructions, or exception commentary

distribution_source
string

external_id
string

extra_properties
dictionary[string, string]

Key/value bag for data not yet formalised in the schema

string

string

financial_account_id
string
required

ID of the retirement account subject to the RMD (IRA, 401k, etc.)

financial_account_name
string

Account nickname shown to advisers

financial_account_number
string

Custodian account number (masked in UI / logs)

financial_account_status
string

Open, Closed, Restricted, etc.

first_year
boolean

True if this is the client's first RMD year (special 4/1 following-year deadline)

id
string
required

Stable UUID primary key for this RMD record

life_expectancy_factor
string

Divisor from the IRS Uniform/Joint Life Table for the RMD year

next_step_date
string<date-time>

Date the next action (call, distribution, reminder) is scheduled

outside_account_number
string

Account number at the third party

prior_year_end_balance
string

12-31 prior-year account balance used in the RMD formula

relationship_status
string

Overall client relationship health (Internal CRM metric)

remaining_amount
string

RequiredAmount − YtdDistributions (updates automatically)

required_amount
string

Dollar amount that must be distributed to meet the RMD obligation

rmd_year
string

Tax year this RMD applies to (YYYY)

state_withholding_pct
string

State tax withholding percentage if applicable to client domicile

status
string

Workflow state (e.g., Pending, In Progress, Completed, Waived)

ten_year_required
boolean

True for inherited (beneficiary) accounts subject to the SECURE Act 10-year rule

tenant_id
string
required

Multi-tenant partition key — identifies your firm or sandbox workspace

updated_at
string<date-time>
required

Timestamp the record was last modified in this system (UTC)

ytd_distributions
string

Total dollars already distributed this calendar year
